name: focus-tower
description: Chrome extension — block distracting websites with inspiring messages
author: Adrien Cominotto <adrien.cominotto@gmail.com>

scripts.test:e2e: DEV_BUILD=1 bun run build && playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:headed: HEADED=1 DEV_BUILD=1 bun run build && playwright test
scripts.package: bun run build && cd dist && zip -r ../focus-tower.zip .
